TABLE.NAME: local_jomot_assign_config
TABLE.COMMENT: Stores Just One More Thing settings per assignment

FIELD.NAME: enable_quiz
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether to generate a quiz from this assignment

FIELD.NAME: quizvisible
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether generated quizzes are visible to students immediately

FIELD.NAME: prompt
FIELD.COMMENT: Additional prompt appended to the default AI prompt

FIELD.NAME: templatequiz
FIELD.COMMENT: Quiz instance id whose settings are copied into generated quizzes (0 = none)

TABLE.NAME: local_jomot_extract_cache
TABLE.COMMENT: Caches text extracted from submission files, keyed by content hash

FIELD.NAME: contenthash
FIELD.COMMENT: SHA1 content hash of the source file

FIELD.NAME: extractedcontent
FIELD.COMMENT: Plain text extracted from the file
